01B39390AE998B76.9F8389A3: Vũ khí sẽ hết đạn, nhưng vẫn có thể nhặt lên và ném.
01B39390AE998B76.3597C980: Vũ khí sẽ có lượng đạn vô hạn trong nhiệm vụ này.
01B39390AE998B76.D786170E: Vũ khí có đạn vô hạn.
01B39390AE998B76.E737DC3A: Không có nguồn lực cơ quan
01B39390AE998B76.B2A10E68: Nguồn lực cơ quan không khả dụng trong nhiệm vụ này, nghĩa là tập trung, lừa dối và quyến rũ không thể sử dụng.
01B39390AE998B76.50B0D0E6: Không có nguồn lực cơ quan.
01B39390AE998B76.2F4240DF: Nguồn lực cơ quan vô hạn
01B39390AE998B76.7AD4928D: Trong nhiệm vụ này, chúng tôi đã trang bị cho bạn nguồn lực cơ quan vô hạn. Hãy lừa họ đi!
01B39390AE998B76.98C54C03: Nguồn lực cơ quan vô hạn.
01B39390AE998B76.88B0A0C8: Không thể hạ gục lặng lẽ
01B39390AE998B76.DD26729A: Trong suốt nhiệm vụ này, tất cả các cách hạ gục lặng lẽ đều bị vô hiệu hóa.
01B39390AE998B76.3F37AC14: Không cho phép hạ gục lặng lẽ.
01B39390AE998B76.AE1E7D0A: Kẻ thù trong nhiệm vụ này sẽ có nhận thức về môi trường xung quanh, bao gồm cả bạn, bị giảm mạnh.
01B39390AE998B76.4C0FA384: Kẻ thù có nhận thức giảm.
01B39390AE998B76.6B08D16A: Nếu xảy ra trao đổi hỏa lực, nhiệm vụ sẽ thất bại. Tránh điều này bằng cách kiểm soát tình huống trước khi leo thang, hoặc không để kẻ thù phát hiện bạn.
01B39390AE998B76.89190FE4: Nhiệm vụ thất bại nếu xảy ra trao đổi hỏa lực.
01B39390AE998B76.1B9AC6AC: Nhiệm vụ này sẽ có yếu tố thời gian. Nếu không hoàn thành mục tiêu trong thời gian giới hạn, nhiệm vụ sẽ thất bại.
01B39390AE998B76.F98B1822: Nhiệm vụ thất bại nếu không hoàn thành mục tiêu trong thời gian giới hạn.
01B39390AE998B76.D77DAB81: Trong nhiệm vụ này, chỉ vũ khí bạn mang theo mới có sẵn, nên mỗi viên đạn đều quan trọng.
01B39390AE998B76.356C750F: Không thể nhặt vũ khí hoặc đạn.
01B39390AE998B76.C1AFFE84: Không nhận bất kỳ sát thương nào
01B39390AE998B76.94392CD6: Không có chỗ cho sai sót trong nhiệm vụ này; nếu bạn bị thương, nhiệm vụ kết thúc.
01B39390AE998B76.7628F258: Nhận sát thương sẽ làm nhiệm vụ thất bại.

011B8BA546DF6F29.CCC6B2C7: Kiểm tra kỹ năng của bạn dưới bầu trời nắng rực rỡ của Mauritania, hoặc chính xác hơn là phiên bản mô phỏng của nó, nơi chúng tôi muốn bạn tiêu diệt tất cả tên cướp biển thù địch trong khu vực một cách nhanh chóng và hiệu quả nhất.

011B8BA546DF6F29.F3E27FA7: Nhiệm vụ thất bại nếu xảy ra trao đổi hỏa lực, nên đảm bảo chúng không bao giờ có cơ hội rút súng nhắm vào bạn.

0198A36A63C5750B.86FC50F0: Sử dụng kỹ năng của bạn trong cận chiến, các đòn tấn công lao tới hoặc hệ thống bẫy được đưa vào mô phỏng, để khiến năm kẻ thù bay khỏi nền.
0198A36A63C5750B.D36A82A2: Ném kẻ thù rơi khỏi nền
0198A36A63C5750B.AEEE3E17: Chỉ dùng các yếu tố cảnh để ném kẻ thù rơi khỏi nền
0198A36A63C5750B.FB78EC45: Chỉ các thiết bị hoặc yếu tố cảnh mới tính. Không tính việc nắm, ném hay lao tới.
0198A36A63C5750B.CE7D62D4: Tiến hành mục tiêu để đặt lại đồng hồ đếm ngược
0198A36A63C5750B.9BEBB086: Nếu đồng hồ này hết thời gian, nhiệm vụ sẽ thất bại. Ném kẻ thù rơi khỏi nền để đặt lại đồng hồ.
0198A36A63C5750B.A7D2800B: Ném kẻ thù rơi xuống mép và sống sót.
0198A36A63C5750B.50BBC771: Ném kẻ thù rơi xuống mép vào dãy núi.
0198A36A63C5750B.6DE785FD: Hãy bắt đầu đơn giản; ném năm kẻ thù rơi xuống mép nền theo bất kỳ cách nào bạn muốn.
0198A36A63C5750B.EB73F753: Tôi hy vọng bạn đã mang giày nhảy, vì bất kỳ tổn thương nào cũng sẽ khiến bạn thất bại nhiệm vụ lần này.
0198A36A63C5750B.202F24F6: Không chỉ phải tránh bị thương, lần này đồng hồ sẽ đếm ngược cho đến khi bạn đẩy được ai đó rơi xuống mép.

016A18A866C128F2.A1456C1F: Tài liệu bí mật đã rơi vào tay sai, và phải thu hồi từ Biệt thự Hoàng Đế ở Việt Nam. Chúng được giữ trong một két an toàn bên trong, mã là 1995. Lấy tài liệu, sau đó lên mái để rút lui.
016A18A866C128F2.F4D3BE4D: Trích xuất tài liệu từ két trong biệt thự
016A18A866C128F2.2B805831: Lấy tài liệu từ két và lên mái để rút lui.
016A18A866C128F2.DCE91F4B: Trở lại Biệt thự Hoàng Đế ở Việt Nam; xâm nhập và tìm tài liệu bí mật trong két ở đâu đó trong biệt thự. Sau khi tìm thấy, bạn cần rút lui qua vị trí trên mái.
016A18A866C128F2.DB57ED59: Tìm lính gác có mã trên điện thoại, tiến lại gần để hack mã két từ điện thoại của họ.
016A18A866C128F2.5DC39FF7: Vào biệt thự và tìm két chứa tài liệu.
016A18A866C128F2.969F4C52: Dùng mã để mở két và lấy tài liệu.
016A18A866C128F2.8B9A7CEA: Lấy thẻ chìa khóa từ một trong những lính gác để vô hiệu hóa khóa khẩn cấp.
016A18A866C128F2.40C6AF4F: Tìm một trong những công tắc chính trong nhà, dùng thẻ chìa khóa để vô hiệu hóa khóa khẩn cấp và mở cửa.
016A18A866C128F2.C652DDE1: Đến mái biệt thự và dùng hộp pháo sáng để rút lui.

01C9B61D776DD434.86E7225A: Súng dịch vụ tiêu chuẩn được Q-Lab cải tiến dành cho các tân binh 00. Rất dễ giấu khi tác chiến, và được điều chỉnh để bắn chính xác — chính vì vậy nó được coi là vũ khí phụ ưa thích của Bond.
01C9B61D776DD434.F047061E: Phiên bản giảm thanh của súng dịch vụ tiêu chuẩn. Cực kỳ dễ giấu trong các nhiệm vụ. Được Q-Lab cải tiến để tăng độ chính xác, khiến nó trở thành vũ khí phụ ưa thích của Bond.
01C9B61D776DD434.83450C39: Súng dịch vụ tiêu chuẩn với phụ kiện tùy chỉnh bắn đạn sốc điện không dây, làm tê liệt mục tiêu con người và phá hủy hệ thống điện tử. Món quà từ Isola và những người chủ bí ẩn của cô.
01C9B61D776DD434.07D33E98: Phiên bản giảm thanh của súng dịch vụ tiêu chuẩn với phụ kiện tùy chỉnh bắn đạn sốc điện không dây, làm tê liệt mục tiêu con người và phá hủy hệ thống điện tử. Món quà từ Isola và những người chủ bí ẩn của cô.
01C9B61D776DD434.CEECE924: Một khẩu súng đơn giản — cực kỳ đáng tin cậy — có mặt khắp nơi trên thế giới, trong tay cả tội phạm lẫn binh sĩ. Sức hãm thấp, khả năng xuyên giáp hạn chế, nhưng chính xác ở tầm trung.
01C9B61D776DD434.D40A7DEA: Phiên bản PDR-9 được cải tiến để bắn loạt đạn mô phỏng không gây chết người, đầu sơn. Được đội Q-Lab chế tạo riêng cho các hoạt động huấn luyện tân binh 00 tại Malta.
01C9B61D776DD434.FA1CA5E7: Nặng hơn súng dịch vụ tiêu chuẩn, Stormer-99 là súng bán tự động dùng hệ thống khóa cam. Ưu điểm là băng đạn lớn hơn, nhưng đổi lại là trọng lượng phía sau tăng, làm giảm khả năng kiểm soát giật.
01C9B61D776DD434.D3EF4B87: Súng bắn xạ ba phát K&S
01C9B61D776DD434.B3A6BAE2: Súng của Knightsman & Son bắn ba viên một lần với băng đạn kéo dài. Là lựa chọn ưa thích của quân nhân — thường thấy trong tay lính của Damien Webb — bắn được 1100 viên 9mm mỗi phút (RPM).
01C9B61D776DD434.4A2357D8: Stormberg 50’cal hy sinh khả năng giấu kín để đổi lấy sức hãm cực mạnh. Bắn đạn xuyên giáp, chính xác nhưng giật mạnh, có thể xuyên qua cả mũ bảo hiểm và trang bị chống đạn hiện đại nhất.
01C9B61D776DD434.C6FC5627: Được lực lượng đặc nhiệm ưa chuộng, súng REX giảm thanh được coi là vũ khí lý tưởng cho các vụ ám sát tàng hình và nhiệm vụ “wet work”. Giảm thanh, nhẹ, giật yếu — lựa chọn vững chắc cho thợ săn tàng hình.
01C9B61D776DD434.2800AF85: Súng máy DRX-2 có băng đạn lớn, tốc độ bắn cực cao, nhưng khó kiểm soát, khuyến khích chiến thuật “bắn x xả láng”. Được tội phạm ưa chuộng — những người ưu tiên mật độ hỏa lực hơn số lượng đạn.
01C9B61D776DD434.72C3C476: Súng trường tấn công Knight 1 được thiết kế cho lực lượng đặc nhiệm Anh. Rất chính xác ở tầm xa, bắn 10 viên/giây, với băng đạn 30 viên. Đáng tin cậy, chính xác và linh hoạt chiến thuật.
01C9B61D776DD434.EE21C1FE: Modified for MI6 training with non-lethal, paint-tipped, simulated rounds, the Knight 1 assault rifle was designed for use by the British special forces. The rifle is extremely accurate out to long range, firing ten rounds a second, and features a thirty-round magazine. Reliable, accurate and tactically flexible.
01C9B61D776DD434.E8831FDE: Rẻ, phổ biến và dễ sản xuất, Zukovsky-21 AR là một trong những vũ khí được sử dụng rộng rãi nhất thế giới, thường thấy trong tay tổ chức tội phạm và thị trường đen. Hy sinh kiểm soát và độ chính xác để đổi lấy sức hãm mạnh.
01C9B61D776DD434.ACC74DAC: Được coi là quá đắt với hầu hết lực lượng quân đội, Osato 7 AR là vũ khí tồn kho từ thí nghiệm chế tạo cho quân đội Nhật Bản, hiện nay thường thấy trong tay các công ty quân sự tư nhân (PMC) được tài trợ tốt nhất. Hy sinh kích thước băng đạn để đổi lấy độ chính xác và vận tốc đầu đạn cao hơn.
01C9B61D776DD434.1BFD20F1: Súng trường tấn công Storm burst
01C9B61D776DD434.00C68A8B: Storm burst AR là súng trường chỉ bắn ba phát một lần, được ưa chuộng vì độ tin cậy và chính xác trong thực địa. Lý tưởng cho người muốn tiết kiệm đạn. Vũ khí tồn kho từ Chiến tranh Việt Nam. Chính xác ở tầm xa với loạt ba viên.
01C9B61D776DD434.8F02FF4A: Súng trường bắn từng phát K&S
01C9B61D776DD434.B2BA236C: Súng trường bắn từng phát K&S là vũ khí tầm xa có thể hạ một con voi. Chính xác ở khoảng cách cực xa, đòi hỏi xạ thủ kiên nhẫn và tinh nhuệ để khai thác tối đa sức sát thương, kể cả khi chịu giật mạnh.
01C9B61D776DD434.07166003: Súng trường xạ thủ Squire là phiên bản cải tiến của Knight 1 AR, thiết kế cho tầm xa cực lớn và nạp đạn xuyên giáp. Là vũ khí bắn đơn, giữ nguyên tốc độ bắn cao của Knight 1 với độ chính xác tăng và sức hãm đáng kể.
01C9B61D776DD434.652B0004: Súng tiểu liên giảm thanh DRS-7
01C9B61D776DD434.0391BE9E: Phiên bản giảm thanh của DRS-7, SMG này đang bắt đầu thể hiện tuổi thọ, nhưng vẫn chưa có đối thủ thay thế xứng đáng cho sử dụng rộng rãi trong quân đội. Thiết kế cho nhiệm vụ tàng hình với đạn siêu âm và cơ chế bắn cách âm.
01C9B61D776DD434.FCEB4829: SB-10 SMG được thiết kế làm vũ khí tự vệ cá nhân (PDW) cho vệ sĩ, nhưng thường được các thợ săn CQB ưa chuộng để dọn phòng. Rất hiệu quả trong giao tranh cự ly gần, nhưng tốc độ bắn cao và sức hãm thấp khiến nó khó kiểm soát ở tầm xa.
01C9B61D776DD434.CFB7E587: Modified for MI6 training with non-lethal, paint-tipped, simulated rounds, the SB-10 SMG was designed as personal defence weapon (PDW) for use by bodyguards, but is often favoured by close quarters battle (CQB) operators for room clearing. Excellent for close range firefights, but high fire rate, and low stopping power, make it unpredictable at longer ranges.
01C9B61D776DD434.77137D0A: Osato 8 SMG là vũ khí hiện đại của Nhật Bản, tốc độ bắn cực cao, có thể vượt qua áo giáp nhờ mật độ đạn dày đặc. Cách tiếp cận này gây giật mạnh và tiêu tốn đạn nhanh, nhưng cực kỳ sát thương ở cự ly gần đến trung bình.
01C9B61D776DD434.064DD604: DRX 12 gauge có thể đơn giản, nhưng đáng tin cậy và phổ biến vì lý do chính đáng. Từ quân đội hiện đại đến thợ săn toàn cầu, thiết kế đơn giản của DRX 12 gauge vẫn giữ được sự hữu dụng suốt nhiều thập kỷ. Mẫu bắn tập trung giúp nó hiệu quả bất ngờ cả ở cự ly trung bình.
01C9B61D776DD434.35FA29C9: T&M compact được thiết kế cho môi trường cận chiến cực kỳ gần, được lực lượng thực thi pháp luật và quân đội ưa chuộng nhờ khả năng gây ngừng hoạt động vượt trội và kích thước nhỏ gọn. Mẫu bắn rộng giúp nó lý tưởng để nhắm vào mục tiêu di chuyển nhanh.
01C9B61D776DD434.56553250: Là một khẩu súng bắn đạn shotgun bán tự động, Storm 12 gauge có tốc độ bắn nhanh hơn các mẫu bơm tay, nhưng tầm hiệu quả ngắn hơn. Là lựa chọn quen thuộc của các lính đánh thuê thích bắn trước, hỏi sau.

System: use the speaker configuration detected by the system software or selected by the user in the system settings. (Use this option for surround)

Stereo: The sound system mixes as two speakers at 30 degree angles from the listener.

Headphones: The sound system mixes as two speakers at 90 degree angles from the listener.

System: Uses the channel configuration detected by the system software. (Use this option for surround).

Stereo: Forces a 2 channel stereo configuration.

Stereo headphones: Forces a 2 channel stereo configuration and 180 degree panning angles to work optimally with stereo headphones.

Mono: Forces a 1 channel mono configuration.

Select the option that matches your audio system configuration for an optimal listening experience. (Note: Changes other audio settings to match, but these can be overridden as desired).
Home Theater: For mid to high end dedicated audio systems.
TV Speakers: For built in TV speakers or audio systems of similar quality.
Headphones: For use with headphones where the sound system mixes as two speakers at 90 degree angles from the listener.
Mono: For a more accessible listening experience where sounds from all directions are routed to a single channel and dynamic range is limited to improve audibility.

Unlocked FPS provides a potentially higher frame rate - up to 60 FPS - at the cost of a potentially more variable frame rate.

Locked FPS provides a fixed frame rate - up to 30 FPS - but is less variable.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.AF0A80CD:
Unlocked FPS provides a potential higher frame rate - up to 120fps - if supported by your television and at the cost of potentially more variable frame rate.

Locked FPS provides a fixed frame rate - up to 60 fps - but is less variable.

Performance: increases performance further at the expense of a larger visual downgrade.

01B4B8D71B46C3B8.23DC6D72: Set the amount the right trigger needs to be pressed to have its input registered.

01B4B8D71B46C3B8.70943CA3: Adjust the size of the text.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.E329A573: We suggest reducing your graphics qualities settings
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.694F0993:
Controls the amount of CPU-only simulation for crowds, Cloth, destruction and particles systems. Would result in improved visual quality at the cost of increased CPU load.

Base: recommended for CPUs with 4 cores or less.

Best: recommended for CPUs with 8 cores or more.

Default setting value was auto selected using CPU detection code.
The visual improvements enabled by this setting only apply to "missions" and they are persisted in savegames. When loading a savegame the value of the setting at the time of saving the game will be used.
The audio improvements apply to all game content.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.3DD7FFA7:
Controls the amount of CPU-only simulation for audio. Would result in improved audio quality at the cost of increased CPU load.

Base: recommended for CPUs with 4 cores or less.

Better: recommended for CPUs with 6 cores.

Best: recommended for CPUs with 8 cores or more.

Default setting value was auto selected based on your CPU.
The improvements enabled by this setting apply to all game content.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.14B41040: Increase or decrease the volume of dialogue.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.8B1C318D: Increase or decrease the volume/strength of audio-driven haptics.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.32661618:
Enable motion blur to give a more smooth look.

Costs GPU time.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.39F6B860: Enables screenspace shadows. Gives high quality shadow detail, at the expense of more GPU processing.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.8A6EFE7B:
Dynamic sharpening of the screen. Counters some effects caused by temporal antialiasing.

Costs GPU time.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.2A2A38CA: Set the size of interaction prompt.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.7C714828: Controls the amount of CPU-only simulation for audio. Would result in improved audio quality at the cost of increased CPU load. The improvements enabled by this setting apply to all game content.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.A254BB99:
Cinematic: full dynamic range with no additional compression. Recommended for home entertainment systems/surround sound systems.

Normal: dynamic range compression making the loudest sounds quieter. Recommended for full range speakers in quiet environments.

Intimate: a large amount of dynamic range compression, making all sounds perceivable at a lower volume. Recommended for small TV speakers, earbuds, noisy environments or night mode.

Dynamic range is the difference in volume between the loudest and quietest sound.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.3710D3CD: This setting helps the game run smoothly by smartly adjusting the image resolution. It uses advanced techniques to keep the picture sharp while boosting performance.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.04BD9CDF: Enables or disables ray tracing capabilities.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.C9AF54EF: Enables or disables ray traced shadows for the sun (or the moon).
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.6787A160: Enables or disables the casting of ray traced reflections. Ray traced reflections enable better quality reflections, in particular of objects not visible on the screen.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.147F33C3: Path tracing simulates how real light behaves by tracing the path of individual light rays. This makes lighting and reflections look more realistic but is very demanding on your graphics card. It requires a GPU with hardware-accelerated ray tracing.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.4BC04FC7: DLSS super resolution boosts frame rates by rendering fewer pixels and using AI to reconstruct high resolution frames. This feature is available for all RTX GPUs.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.8DD72A5E: Ray reconstruction enhances image quality by generating high-quality pixels between sampled rays for intensive ray traced content. This feature requires a GeForce RTX graphics card.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.A8C4F2E0: Frame generation boosts frame rates by using AI to render additional frames. 2x is supported on a GeForce RTX 40 series graphics card or higher, while 3x and above are supported on a GeForce RTX 50 series graphics card.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.DCF2B872: Amount of image sharpening applied by AMD FSR™.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.108F60AB: AMD FSR™ Upscaling is an innovative, optimized spatial upscaling technology that produces superior image quality while maintaining smooth gameplay.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.16F3B137: Automatically adjust the internal resolution to help maintain a stable frame rate.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.47A2954B: Minimum resolution used by the game when dynamic resolution is enabled, as a percentage of the native resolution. Can be fixed depending on selected resolution scaling mode.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.6019F27A: Maximum resolution used by the game when dynamic resolution is enabled, as a percentage of the native resolution. Can be fixed depending on selected resolution scaling mode.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.DD8F1974: Controls quality of volumetric fog and atmosphere rendering. Lower settings improve performance.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.04FE7BC4: Controls quality of volumetric effects such as smoke. Lower settings improve performance.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.48452498: Controls the resolution of terrain virtual texturing, mostly affecting VRAM usage but also performance.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.2D92C94F: Controls quality of global illumination elements including SSGI, and radiance probes. Lower settings improve performance.
01B4B8D71B46C3B8.A41D6183: Adjusts the level of quality of the smoulder effect.

011E219C785493F4.EBEB063A: All the time in the world
011E219C785493F4.6CA7500B: Complete "All the time in the world".

018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.C6681DEC: The touch screens can be used to call for a cleaning robot. The robots have executive clearance and move freely about the floor.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.FA161E6E: The Q-watch could hack the door's interior motion sensors. But line of sight is required.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.48172276: There is a robot control panel in the empty meeting room. The door is locked, though.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.249716B6: The window leads out to the balcony. There might be a way to access it.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.1EBB7249: The safety inspector is vigilant about any type of accident.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.3BF71641: A cleaning robot has claimed the technician's locker key.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.BFBED08B: One of the cabinets in the locker room is locked.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.2A55FAA2: Where the cleaning robots empty their containers. It must connect to a disposal unit in the next room.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.EA69596A: Accessing the server room requires a lab coat.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.635AF5E8: Sir Nicholas was number one in his class, according to his King's College diploma.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.3B430BD8: Hyperion 9, a sci-fi themed adventure game called designed by Sir Nicholas in the 1990s. Quite revolutionary in its day.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.3CD3C7A4: Roko's Basilisk, rendition four. Part of an AI-generated art series depicting the legendary hypothetical AI demon.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.AEFAB756: Webb Industries site three in Hong Kong. The company has offices all around the world.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.9886689A: Sir Nicholas takes a daily dose of ACE inhibitors to lower his blood pressure.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.474B8FB8: A framed photo of Sir Nicholas and Foreign Secretary Bright. Taken at the inauguration of THEIA Mk 2.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.794C6AD0: The Tabula Rasa general purpose android. Webb Industries' latest technological endeavour.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.9E8E75F6: Appears Damien committed war crimes during his time as a PMC, but Sir Nicholas used his considerable influence to bury his son's record.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.8E111133: Appears Damien suffers from antisocial personality disorder (ASPD).
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.8BB5FBE7: A sculpture of the Antikythera mechanism; the world's oldest analogue computer.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.9D5B707F: A conspicuously large sculpture of a cat adorns Sir Nicholas' otherwise empty desk.
018F5AEF1B6CBBBB.C82CF79B: A model of Webb Industries' newest property, built to house their Swam Robotics programme.

01587D22D72798AE.191C5B23: Head to the shipwreck on the coast
01587D22D72798AE.F2EAA98A: Find a way inside the shipwreck

01F42963FB3A4CB7.90FB40AC: After infiltrating the boathouse, Bond and Greenway find 009’s beaten and battered corpse.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.8DB981C7: The failed mission in Slovakia has landed MI6 and M in a diplomatic storm, leaving the fate of the 00 programme hanging by a thread. Thanks to Bond's quick-thinking MI6 were able to track 009 to Aleph, a black-market arms bazaar in Mauritania run by the self-proclaimed pirate king, Bawma. Greenway and Bond must infiltrate Aleph, find 009 and bring him back home for questioning.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.BC2BE832: After having parked their Land Rover, Bond and Greenway enter the beating heart of Aleph – the arms bazaar - in order to find information on 009 and his whereabouts.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.983B8221:
Having made their way through the tunnels, Bond and Greenway reach the centre of the bazaar where they spot Bawma and his right-hand man, Barkhad Ali. 
Noticing tension between the two, Greenway believes Ali is their best bet to tracking down 009 in Aleph.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.AC9EFFE3:
Bond and Greenway must find a way to get inside the high-end auction that Ali is running. 
Greenway tells Bond he'll get the invitations required to get inside, leaving Bond to explore the bazaar and find ways to earn enough money to cover the one hundred thousand dollar buy-in fee.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.B9CACB72: Having paid the one hundred thousand dollar buy-in fee, Bond and Greenway gain access to the auction.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.17C5DD4C:
After investigating the crime scene, everything points to 009 having been eliminated by his own men over a money dispute. And yet Bond notices something, a clue pointing to a Transworld shipwreck in the distance. 
Bond and Greenway head back out, but are captured by Bawma’s men and dangled above a crocodile pit as the crowd cheers. Bond tries to reason with the pirate king while avoiding the snapping maw of his pets, but in the end, Greenway bails them out with the promise of intel on the location of Bawma's long-lost sister, Harmony. 
Bawma frees them and the duo set out on a journey along the coastline of Aleph towards the Transworld wreck in the hope of shedding light on the mysterious clue left behind by 009.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.307AF298: After winning the auction and convincing Ali to give them 009’s location in exchange for control of Aleph once Bawma has been overthrown by MI6, Bond and Greenway split up and make their way to 009’s hideout, a boathouse on the water.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.A81C1FDF: Bond and Greenway explore the Transworld cargo ship, following the clues left for them by 009.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.667A35E8: Inside the wreck of the Transworld cargo ship Bond and Greenway find evidence in an old Q-Case that points to 009 not being responsible for the bombing of the Grand Carpathian in Slovakia.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.88A43885: After finding the Q-Case with the evidence in it, Bond and Greenway are ambushed by the same mercenaries he fought on the airstrip in Slovakia.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.B219B534:
After escaping the Transworld wreck, their vehicle is destroyed by a mysterious man in a golden mask wielding an RPG. 
Bond and Greenway are forced to make a last stand as the masked man's squad of mercenaries move in on their position.
01F42963FB3A4CB7.FBB88063: THEIA has tracked 009 to Aleph, a black-market arms bazaar run by the self-proclaimed pirate king, Bawma. Greenway and Bond must infiltrate Aleph, find 009 and bring him in - any way they see fit.

01016CE7AFD99CDA.5423389F: Bond travels to Vietnam on a covert solo operation. THEIA, it appears, has detected another big data “phantom pattern”, mistaking the statistically unlikely but entirely unrelated deaths of two green energy pioneers as the work of elusive terrorist Caliban. However, according to a recent report from INTERPOL, Caliban has been dead for months. To cover up THEIA’s mistake, Damien is en-route to The Pearl, a luxury resort on the coast, where he intends to stage a copycat killing to prove Caliban is still active.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.6D661768:
Upon arriving at The Pearl, Bond receives a package from Q. The package contains Q-Glasses and Q-Trak. 
The glasses allow Moneypenny to see, record, and store data back at MI6. 
The Q-Trak is a smart bug capsule that contains a gel that can be ingested by a target, or absorbed through their skin.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.A0850C94: Using the Q-Glasses, Bond must get eyes on The Pearl’s guest ledger so Moneypenny can run the names and identify potential targets that fit Caliban’s M.O.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.8DDCCB5B:
Moneypenny has identified three targets that fit Caliban’s M.O: Geneticist Theresa Lorca, billionaire playboy, Ellis White, and green energy philanthropist, Ramon Hernandez.
Bond must bug all three before Damien reaches the resort with the Q-Trak.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.A3955AD6: With all three potential targets bugged, Bond readies himself for the festivities at The Pearl where he will spend the evening with Theresa Lorca, while also keeping tabs on both Ramon Hernandez and Ellis White.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.50B80612: Moneypenny has tracked Ellis White to Theresa Lorca's villa, their heart rates dangerously elevated. Suspecting something is awry, Bond makes his way there.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.920A95E9: Somehow Moneypenny tracked the wrong SUVs and lost track of Damien. His men are already at The Pearl, heavily armed and patrolling the grounds of the Emperor Villa.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.C3657C8F:
Via the Q Glasses, Bond records an incriminating conversation where Damien confesses to setting up the Caliban copycat killing with Niko Murto and his men. 
MI6 has the evidence to bring down Sir Nicholas. 
Damien orders his men to kill Ellis White, forcing Bond to infiltrate the villa and save him before turning his attention to finding and rescuing Theresa Lorca.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.CE8D3921: Having saved Ellis White, Bond must find and rescue Theresa Lorca before Damien can complete his plans.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.645224A6: Having fought his way through the grounds of The Pearl, Bond finds Theresa Lorca and comes face-to-face with Niko Murto.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.00C9D31D:
Having saved Theresa Lorca and defeated Niko Murto, Bond is knocked unconscious during the explosion. 
Captured by Damien and his men, he's taken to a nearby quarry before being strapped to a marble slab where Damien intends to kill him.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.9A830C37:
Greenway saves Bond in the nick of time, wounding Damien in the process. 
With Damien on the run and Bond's hands still bound, he makes his way through the quarry, and a swarm of Damien's men, towards Greenway, who is providing overwatch.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.DAC116F6: Bond and Greenway are reunited. They tool up and work together, moving through the quarry in pursuit of Damien.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.3D23256A: Using the Q-Watch Damien took from him, Bond chases him down while Greenway holds swathes of his men off.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.E8DC3E2C: Bond hunts down and faces off against Damien in a brutal fight to the death.
01016CE7AFD99CDA.56176FE3: Bond goes on a covert solo operation at The Pearl, a luxury resort in Vietnam, to stop Damien Webb from covering up another of THEIA’s mistakes and retrieve solid proof of the Webbs’ wrongdoings.

01492EAB34D81521.5E09FBA9: In Vietnam Bond secured irrefutable evidence of Webb's THEIA coverups, but at the cost of Greenway’s life. Back at MI6 he expects a quick wrap up and Webb brought to justice, but once again Sir Nicholas is one step ahead. He threatens to cause the biggest security leak in UK history - unless they cut him an immunity deal. MI6 has decided to comply.
01492EAB34D81521.6C82462A: While talking with Moneypenny Bond has been convinced that Webb must have a quantum entangled mirror device. He decides he will try to destroy it – even if it means burning all bridges to MI6 and everyone there. First, he will need to steal field-equipment from Q-Lab.
01492EAB34D81521.E899D3D4: Back from Vietnam, Bond learns that Sir Nicholas is threatening to cause the biggest security leak in UK history - unless they cut him an immunity deal. To Bond’s horror, MI6 has decided to comply.

0131EF00566ED6A9.D3D6D010:
Sir Nicholas is dead and the HYPERION core destroyed. 
His goal achieved, Bond turns himself over to MI6 to face the consequences of his insubordination. But he is unexpectedly freed from his holding cell when the building comes under direct attack. 
While Isola makes a run for it, Bond stays behind to face the unknown intruders.
0131EF00566ED6A9.9A882C30: Bond manages to contact M who tells him to go to Operations and find Moneypenny. She is the only one who can lift the lockdown.
0131EF00566ED6A9.AD392817: Bond discovers that the intruders are attempting to steal the THEIA core. Moneypenny has gone to protect it. Bond must reach the THEIA chamber before it is too late.
0131EF00566ED6A9.C0027CC5:
Bond learns that a revenant Damien Webb is behind the assault. Robbed of his legacy and inheritance, Damien has come to claim THEIA and sell it to the highest bidder. 
Damien forces Moneypenny to extract the core, then stabs her and leaves her to bleed out, but Q arrives in time to stablize her. 
Armed with Q's special watch, Bond rushes back to Q-lab to reach the Valhalla prototype. It's the only thing with enough fire power to stop Damien and his men.
0131EF00566ED6A9.DD3E3650: After a spectacular fight, Bond stops the intruders, but Damien traps him inside the Valhalla and escapes. Freeing himself, Bond pursues Damien into the sewers in a desperate attempt to retrieve the THEIA core.
0131EF00566ED6A9.51A2EF00: Locked in a fight to the death with his exo-powered nemesis, Bond learns that Damien plans to flood MI6 and kill everyone inside to cover his escape.
0131EF00566ED6A9.F497AE60: Sir Nicholas is dead and HYPERION destroyed. Bond turns himself in to face the consequences of his insubordination. But he is unexpectedly freed from his cell when the building comes under attack. While Isola bolts, Bond faces the intruders.

0120ADA8FBD3074E.D2E37A17: M has called the recruits to MI6. She’s suspending exams to send them on a mission. Rogue agent 009 is coming in from the cold.

011FD3AAE1AC04A9.94E80679: M has cleared Bond for advanced training. He will be going back and forth between Malta and London for 6 month to become a 00-agent.

01BA69950AAA54F0.D8961D9F: Bond has completed basic training and has returned to MI6 for his performance review.
01BA69950AAA54F0.4C4B8F6C: Against Greenway's recommendation, M has decided to clear Bond for advanced training.

01B0ED6CF3AA349D.5091E34A: Back in London the recruits decide to go clubbing to blow off some steam. Just as they get started, they all receive text messages from MI6; A night out has just turned into a field test.

0133F8407AD41C5B.B06BA7C9: In search of the MI6 contact in red, Bond mistakenly approaches the wrong person causing her boyfriend to lash out. He now needs to find the real contact.
0133F8407AD41C5B.9AEBF5CB: Bond meets with the actual MI6 contact and is told to look for a pickup in the gents.
0133F8407AD41C5B.39989460: A mission brief states that there's a leak at the Trade Ministry and that there are three possible culprits, all present at the club tonight. The recruits are divided into teams to investigate each suspect. Bond, Nash and Singh are instructed to investigate Joshua Pike.
0133F8407AD41C5B.70CAC111: As Bond is ready to get started, he is confronted by the jealous boyfriend from the bar. A fight breaks out.
0133F8407AD41C5B.4114EDD5: Back on track Bond learns that Pike is in the upstairs lounge – guest list only. He manages to find a way up.
0133F8407AD41C5B.6D670992: Bond locates Pike and starts the data extraction from his phone. The recruits learn that Pike is the culprit behind the Trade Ministry leak.
0133F8407AD41C5B.4D50559E: Bond successfully completes the data extraction from Pike's phone.
0133F8407AD41C5B.CAD0435E: About to celebrate their success, Singh discovers that Pike is meeting his contact at the club for a handover. The recruits decide to trap Pike upstairs and intercept the meeting to unravel their illegal network.
0133F8407AD41C5B.5DEB62E8: Bond impersonates Pike and successfully makes her call her handler. The recruits are informed that extraction will take place outside the club in 2 minutes.
0133F8407AD41C5B.F2691236: About to exit the club, Bond is jumped by the jealous boyfriend and his cronies. When he joins the other recruits, they all receive texts from M. She wants them in her office first thing in the morning.

0119FDF6FA06C404.787D46DD:
009, a rogue MI6 operative guilty of high treason, has resurfaced after years off the grid. He claims to hold evidence of a conspiracy against the state, which he intends to hand over to John Greenway in exchange for a pardon. 
The meeting will take place at the Grand Carpathian Hotel in Slovakia during the world chess championship, and M sends the 00 recruits along as undercover backup. However Greenway, who distrusts Bond and wants him nowhere near the action, assigns him the unglamorous role of chauffeur. 
It seems Bond's first field assignment will be confined to the car park.
0119FDF6FA06C404.0B6630E0: Bond’s interest is soon piqued when he notices a suspicious blond man dressed like a bellhop. Bond abandons his post to investigate.
0119FDF6FA06C404.FF761A61:
Following a tip from Monroe, Bond learns that the blond man has changed his disguise. 
His suspicions are further confirmed when a power surge temporarily takes out the hotel's security system. 
Clocking the blond man dressed as a chef, Bond picks up the trail.
0119FDF6FA06C404.B6A9FA52: Bond tracks the blond man to a cellar beneath tournament hall. Here he finds Monroe dead and a large bomb rigged to explode.
0119FDF6FA06C404.6EC2D0EF: Bond fights off the blond man - and his identical twin - and dismantles the bomb in the nick of time. But an unseen secondary device explodes, collapsing the ceiling.
0119FDF6FA06C404.70FD8443:
Making his way back to the devastated grand hall, Bond rescues Cressida who got pinned down during the explosion. 
Greenway appears, naming 009 as the mastermind behind the bombing, and tells Bond to stop him at all costs.
0119FDF6FA06C404.5D1B9D18:
Commandeering a vintage Aston Martin, Bond pursues 009 to an abandoned airfield, where an unmarked cargo plane is taxiing. 
Outnumbered and outgunned, Bond proceeds - determined to stop 009 from escaping.
0119FDF6FA06C404.48E05D3F: The recruits accompany Greenway on an undercover mission to apprehend the rogue 009 during the World Chess Championship in Slovakia. But Greenway, who distrusts Bond and wants him nowhere near the action, assigns him the role of chauffeur.

01F0F07CEB618B4D.79EA196D:
Things went horribly wrong in Slovakia. 009 escaped and, despite Bond’s best efforts, a bomb was detonated, killing half the recruits.
Bond has returned to MI6 from his dead friends’ funeral service to be informed by M that he and Greenway are going to Mauritania to hunt 009 down.
01F0F07CEB618B4D.C93CA57A: Slovakia snowballs into a diplomatic crisis and the fate of the 00 programme hangs by a thread. Returning from his friends’ funeral service, Bond is informed by M that he and Greenway are being sent to Africa to hunt 009 down.

018201164161BF49.895CF606:
Bond and Greenway infiltrated Webb HQ where they learned that THEIA is flawed and Webb has been covering up its mistakes from day one. One such coverup caused the 00-programme to be discontinued and 009 to be framed. Realising this, Greenway quit MI6.
Alone, Bond returns to MI6 determined to bring down the Webbs.
018201164161BF49.8C56687B: THEIA is flawed and Sir Nicholas has been covering up its mistakes from day one. One such coverup framed 009 and caused the 00 programme to be shut down. Realising this, Greenway has quit MI6. Alone, Bond returns to MI6 determined to bring down the Webbs.

01BC158FA8035CAF.8B45664B:
Bond and Isola infiltrate Webb R&D within the British Antarctic Territory. 
Bond believes Webb hides a secondary quantum computer named HYPERION in the facility. THEIA and HYPERION are quantum entangled, enabling Webb to cause the biggest security leak in UK history. 
Bond plans to shut down HYPERION, ending Webb's stranglehold on MI6, while Isola is on a personal vendetta to kill Webb. 
But first they must infiltrate the R&D facility via cable car.
01BC158FA8035CAF.113C0DCA: Posing as new employees, Bond and Isola arrive at the R&D facility in search of Sir Nicholas Webb and HYPERION.
01BC158FA8035CAF.DC791F92: Bond learns that Sir Nicholas Webb is located in the top-secret Operations Dept. Splitting up with Isola, Bond's path takes him through Robotics.
01BC158FA8035CAF.7242648A:
Bond and Isola gain access to the restricted command centre; the heart of Webb's operation. 
Here Bond learns that Webb is using the full might of HYPERION to plot a coup d'etat of the UK and instate Stephen Bright as the next PM. But he is caught by Chief Legal Officer Roger Finch who sounds the alarm before being incapacitated by Isola, who leaves for Webb's penthouse. 
With armed operatives converging on him, Bond must fight his way down towards HYPERION.
01BC158FA8035CAF.C379D3FC:
The situation goes from bad to worse when a vindictive Roger Finch orders the staff to remove the androids' safety restrictions and upload a defence software protocol, turning them hostile. 
Reaching HYPERION just became a whole lot harder.
01BC158FA8035CAF.DAAFEE5F:
Bond finally reaches HYPERION, but is disarmed by Webb who wears a dead man's switch set to leak MI6's data at the moment of his death. 
However, before Webb can kill Bond, he is mortally wounded by Isola. 
It turns out her vendetta was misdirection. All this time, she was after the HYPERION core, and while Bond is forced to keep Webb alive and prevent the dead man's switch, she is free to obtain it.
01BC158FA8035CAF.C921A979:
With Webb dead and HYPERION disabled, MI6's secrets are safe, but Isola is escaping with the stolen core. 
As the whole building begins to crumble, Bond takes pursuit, determined that, this time, she will not get away.
01BC158FA8035CAF.C0039AA2: Bond believes Sir Nicholas Webb hides a secondary quantum computer named HYPERION at the company’s Antarctic R&D facility. Teaming up with Isola, Bond infiltrates the site to shut down HYPERION, ending Webb's stranglehold on MI6.

01BA290E9007B2FC.B4DD0C25:
Bond and Greenway break into Webb Industries HQ to uncover what Sir Nicholas is hiding before he destroys the evidence. 
Their destination: an impregnable, self-contained structure atop the main building known as "the perch", where the company stores its data.
01BA290E9007B2FC.83D6BEFA: Ascending through the executive floors, Bond and Greenway encounter Isola Vale engaged in a heist of her own. She has a plan for getting access to the perch and enlists Bond's help to steal the command override code from Sir Nicholas' penthouse safe.
01BA290E9007B2FC.EEF9514D: Bond obtains the command override code, but is trapped in the penthouse when Sir Nicholas and Damien unexpectedly enter.
01BA290E9007B2FC.6056A495: Guided by Isola, Bond races to reach the perch before the security system reboots.
01BA290E9007B2FC.04410736: Safely inside the perch, Isola leaves to pursue her own agenda. Bond and Greenway proceed to infiltrate the data center to obtain evidence of Sir Nicholas' wrongdoing before his staff scrubs the servers.
01BA290E9007B2FC.0765A8A3:
Bond and Greenway learn the shocking truth: 
THEIA is not infallible. It only appears so because Sir Nicholas covers up its mistakes, altering facts to fit the data. 
But before they can make a hard copy, a lockdown triggers. sealing them both inside the control room. Sir Nicholas appears outside the glass and Bond confronts him about his crimes.
01BA290E9007B2FC.918917B9: Bond and Greenway break free from Sir Nicholas' death trap as elite mercenaries converge from all directions.
01BA290E9007B2FC.4BF0E097: Getting separated in the chaos, Bond fights his way to rendezvous with Greenway at the flight deck and escape by helicopter.
01BA290E9007B2FC.76BCF082: Following the shocking discovery at the Webb gala, Bond and Greenway break into Webb Industries to uncover what Sir Nicholas is hiding. Their destination: an impregnable, self-contained structure atop the main building known as the Perch.

01733105E695CE64.CD222E16: After barely making it out of Mauritania alive, and with the 00 programme in tatters, Bond is ordered to stand down and return home to his flat in Bayswater where he is to await further instructions, even though those responsible for the death of Monroe are still at large.
01733105E695CE64.9649325D:
Upon entering the empty apartment and reminiscing about the good times with Cressida and Monroe, Bond is ambushed by an assassin in his bedroom. 
After taking his would-be killer out, he confronts another in the kitchen before a sniper opens fire from a nearby rooftop, decimating the apartment in a hail of bullets.
01733105E695CE64.453E5D5F:
Bond races across the rooftops before catching up with the sniper, Tero Murto, one of the twins he encountered in Slovakia and Mauritania; the very same ones responsible for the death of Monroe. 
With the help of Moneypenny, Bond traces the Murto to the W&A Museum where the Webb Industries' 125th anniversary is taking place.
01733105E695CE64.C5FC78C4:
Inside the gala Bond discovers Murto's dumped burner phone in the bathroom bin. Bond spots a security camera outside the men's room. 
Moneypenny tells him to find the CCTV room. If he can gain access to the camera feed she can use facial recognition software to track Murto throughout the building.
01733105E695CE64.92166EDB: After making his way past gala security and gaining access to the upper floor of the museum, Bond breaks into the CCTV room and uses the security terminal to pinpoint Murto’s position inside the building.
01733105E695CE64.891EDF3E: Bond tracks Murto to the basement, only to be ambushed and forced into using the shadows, and his wit, to defeat the murderous twin who took the life of his friend.
01733105E695CE64.74E589FD:
Bond makes his way back upstairs to confront Sir Nicholas. There he meets his son, Damien, and the mysterious Isola Vale. 
Damien poisons both of them and they pass out before coming to in a kill room in the bowels of the museum. 
Sir Nicholas and Damien plan to silence both of them for good to keep their secrets from getting out into the world.
01733105E695CE64.D9AB5F22: After taking out Damien’s men and freeing Bond, Isola abandons him, escaping through a window, forcing Bond to make his own way through the building, and Webb's men.
01733105E695CE64.0468627C:
Making his way through the lowers levels before gaining access to the rooftop, Bond finds himself in the museum courtyard. 
The place has been locked down by a small army of Webb’s men, two of which have a keycard that he needs to get his hands on in order to get out of there.
01733105E695CE64.A3F1A85C: After making his way through the courtyard, Bond comes face-to-face with Damien's kill team, a band of lethal mercenaries sent in to put him down.
01733105E695CE64.DA6B8228: With Damien's kill team down, Bond escapes the museum via the loading bay in a hail of bullets.
01733105E695CE64.CA76ACCB: M closes the file on 009, despite Bond and Greenway insisting that the true mastermind behind the Slovakia bombing is still at large. Bond is told to stand down and return to his flat in Bayswater until the future of the 00 programme is decided.

01404AF21B80A07E.752604DC:
In Iceland Bond defied the advice of his impromptu MI6 handler and, against all odds, saved an MI6 retrieval team. But his actions caused the destruction of their mission objective - a valuable enemy satellite from which MI6 could have gained a significant advantage.
Now back in London, Bond is called to MI6 unsure of whether to expect a medal or a lawsuit.

0129C94933B87E8C.2B1C7072:
Today's archive code (I know how you like puzzles, Carmine)
Digit #1: I am one.
Digit #2: I am two digits higher than digit 3.
Digit #3: I am two digits higher than digit 4.
Digit #4: I am ten digits less than digits 3 and 2 combined.
Hint: The solution is the year of a famous battle.
0129C94933B87E8C.7E770FD7:
A back channel message from the UK Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office warning about a rogue MI6 agent who may be planning to infiltrate the Webb R&D facility. 
The FCDO takes no responsibility for said agent's actions, which should not be considered a breach of trust or a violation of the ongoing negotiations. 
The message is signed by Foreign Secretary Stephen Bright.
0129C94933B87E8C.62FB7EFB:
Keypad reader's conked out again. Running diagnostics. 
N.B. Sensitive equipment - DON'T touch! 
Pardon the inconvenience. 
Glen from Maintenance

"Attention all staff. 
The code to the archive is stored in the office safe and MUST be changed every twenty-four hours. Thank you. 
Roger Finch."

Patrick."

01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.A34F91DB: An aide memoire made by Sir Nicholas Webb to help recall his safe code. It reads: "Diploma. Painting. Game. Model."
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.ADCC3B77: A medical report by Webb's private physician. Appears Sir Nicholas has a heart condition. He wears a smart medical bracelet that monitors his blood pressure and takes a daily dose of ACE inhibitors.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.0EC6E5A5:
Damien Webb's "unofficial" MI6 case file. 
It's heavily redacted but seems to suggest that Damien committed war crimes during his time as a private military contractor. In 2018, he and a small band of mercenaries were arrested during a botched coup d’etat attempt in central Africa, orchestrated by a Dutch mining company. 
Sir Nicholas must have pulled some heavy favours to bury his son’s antics and avoid a scandal that would tarnish the family name.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.323E55C0:
A 2012 psych evaluation of Damien Webb from the Hoffmann clinic in Zürich. 
Regarding: Psychological evaluation and diagnosis:
The patient exhibits many of the standard symptoms of antisocial personality disorder (ASPD); deviance, impulsivity, aggression, recklessness, manipulation and deception, callous and unemotional traits and feelings of contempt. 
The condition was likely triggered by the trauma of his mother's suicide when the patient was eight years old.
The patient vividly recalls finding his mother's lifeless body after having consumed a lethal overdose of prescription painkillers. He reports that his mother was behaving erratically, even threateningly, in the weeks leading up to her suicide, and that she claimed her son was an 'imposter' (suggesting a rare case of undiagnosed Capgras syndrome).
While generally displaying antisocial behavior towards his surroundings, the patient has developed a fixation on his deceased mother, harbouring obsessive and conspiratorial fantasies about the causes of her death, including that his father deliberately gas lit her, triggering a depression and subsequent mental breakdown. These fantasies, however unsubstantiated, have only served to further alienate the patient from his family.
Treatment Plan: long-term psychotherapy to address underlying trauma and integrate identities, combined with medication for occurring symptoms like depression or anxiety.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.9258C8DB: A striking illustration of the famous AI thought experiment known as Roko's Basilisk. The work itself appears to be generated by a Webb Industries AI. The title reads "Basilisk, rendition #4".
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.89B3EACA: A framed Mathematics degree from King's College, London. Sir Nicholas graduated first in class – ahead of not one, but two Nobel laureates.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.D0EA02AA: A framed photo from the inauguration of THEIA Mk 2. Sir Nicholas shaking hands with Foreign secretary Bright who spearheaded the privatization of SIGINT – condemning the double O programme to the dustbin of history.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F851A9D2: A copy of an early 90s adventure game, written and programmed by one Nicholas Webb. A dystopian, neon-soaked sci-fi adventure titled "Hyperion 9".
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.FF9A290C: A large cat sculpture dominating Sir Nicholas' desk.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.AAA1090B: A scale model of Webb Industries’ Hong Kong office entitled "Site III".
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F068279B: The Tabula Rasa general purpose android. Webb Industries' next game-changing technology.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.FEC07F04: "Antikythera" by the famous basque artist and sculptor Emilé Gorka. It depicts the world's oldest example of an analogue computer. Its value is indeterminable.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.C942C29B: Webb Industries' newest research site planned to house the company's swarm robotics factory.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.9D671ADD: A picture of Damien Webb with his old PMC, Riptide, along with the Murto twins. An elite mercenary group believed to operate in many of the world's most dangerous hot zones. The note on the back reads "Yemen, 2018".
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.3BF6D786: A family photo of a young Damien with his parents. Written on the back: Nicholas, Lydia and Damien, 2004.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.AF2FC03A: A Hampshire police report on the death of Damien's mother, Lydia Florence Webb in 2004. The cause of death: suicide by prescription painkillers. The worn edges indicate the report has been studied obsessively.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.08EBAA83: An extensive collection of high-end skin and hair products. Worthy of a true groomer.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.2D222AC8: Damien's social calendar. Tonight's gala at the W&A is underlined. Appears he is out-of-office for the next couple of days on a business trip.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.4B404088: A receipt from a Norwegian biomedical company, Saxon Nordic, for some type of chemical compound. Appears to be a highly expensive trial drug.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.AAD99676: A sketch for an upgrade to Damien’s warrior mask.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.D58FF364: A PhD certificate in Crisis Management from Columbia University belonging to one Isola Vale.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F623ABB8: Blueprints of Webb HQ and surveillance pictures of the perch entrance, the building mainframe and guard patrol patterns.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F2F0D9BA: An adorable Bernese mountain dog named Humphrey. A stock photo, no doubt.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.7642F0E8:
The cleaning robots have access to every room on the floor, and may be re-directed to a specific location using the control panels situated throughout the floors. 
The door open automatically when the electronic sensors detect an approaching robot. No human assistance required.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.FB053362: An art piece celebrating the many technological breakthroughs by Webb Industries during its long and impactful history. Commissioned in commemoration of the company’s 125th anniversary.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.6747B054: A magazine on modern architecture featuring an article about the Webb Industries building and its daughter offices around the world.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.14828F41:
“Please tell the cleaners not to stand on our brand-new equipment boxes when they clean the vent in the maintenance room. Get a bloody ladder! 
Carmine, IT office.”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.CC66C72F: This traditional Bordeaux wine has a velvety palate with an oaky aroma on the nose. An elegant, yet not ostentatious choice, at 300 pounds a bottle.

01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.71E13D74: A layout of the executive floors.

01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F35FD62A: A scaled model of Webb Industries’ ground-breaking Gjallarhorn long-range artillery cannon, revealed in 1908.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.E4207601:
“Welcome all. 
Tonight, we celebrate the history of Webb Industries. But merely looking back would be complacent. Personally, I prefer to look ahead. 
For more than a century Webb Industries has pushed for a better, safer future. Through precision and perfection, we've continually reduced risk and minimized damage. 
And yet, I want us to aim higher. 
I believe technology has the power to elevate us above the chaotic fog of our sapient brains and into a more gracious and enlightened future. A future free from human limitation, and safe from human error. 
I have dedicated myself to making sure that every day, that future moves one step closer.”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.25849E3C:
“Attention all staff. 
After careful consideration, it has been decided that an invitation to join one of the elite dev teams at our R&D facility is a private matter and will not be openly announced at Friday meetings, in the monthly newsletter etc. 
It is up to each employee whether they want to share the happy news with their team or not. This is to prevent toxic inter-departmental rivalry and resentment. 
I appreciate your understanding. 
Jocelyn, UK Head of HR.”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.2C2B3636:
“Attention all staff.
This is a (not-so)friendly reminder that you are not to discuss classified projects on the tube, in a taxi, at the pub or any other public, semi-public or otherwise non-secure location. Even the smallest breach may cause severe financial harm to the company, our partners and shareholders.
We do not want a repeat of the Edinburgh incident. If in doubt whether to speak, don’t!
Thank you.
Charles Danville, Chief marketing director.”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.101C2A0D:
“Siobhan, do us a favour and take Cheeseman for a pint later, will you? I found the poor chap sobbing in a cupboard after Finch tore him a new arsehole over a botched lunch order. 
N.B. I know he’s a bit of a twat but he’s one of us now.”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.9DA4EA57: “I just clocked Isola Vale sneaking out of DW’s office. Think they’re having a fling?”

Attention all senior staff. 
When discussing the Tabula Rasa general purpose robot with your teams, please reiterate that we will not be developing military or law enforcement capabilities. 
Any such initiative would go against our company ethos and hurt our transition in the public mind from defence contractor to consumer tech corporation. Emphasize instead TR's revolutionary potential as caretaker, tutor, paramedic and disaster relief worker. 
You are the ambassadors of the Webb Industries brand, so let's set a positive example. Thank you. 
Charles Danville, Chief Marketing Director.

01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.D59B954F:
In memory of Malcolm Webb (1892-1968), the company's second CEO. 
Under his thriving leadership, Webb Industries became synonymous, not only with quality, reliability, and precision, but also restraint and accountability. A scholar and humanitarian, Malcolm believed in a measured response with minimal collateral damage.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.02E7E437: A model of the Horus Mk II low orbit spy satellite. Launched in 1965, it changed the rules and landscape of SIGINT forever.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.2B3A9FFE:
A miniature covert listening device nicknamed the 'Nosy Parker' developed in 1985. 
Originally developed for the SIS, it became an unexpected commercial success, propelling Webb Industries into the ranks of the top ten Defence contractors in the world.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.57A69FBA:
A scale model of the GOLEM autonomous vehicle guidance system. developed in 2009. 
One of newly appointed CEO Nicholas Webb's first big successes, the GOLEM deploys a sophisticated deep learning neural network, utterly ahead of its time.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.4BB5088F: A painting of Sir Nicholas Webb receiving a Knighthood from the late Queen Elizabeth II.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.29CC0FCC:
A tablet inscribed with the Sir Nicholas Webb's core value statement. 
"We are optimistic futurists driven by a desire to reduce human error on a global scale through technology and AI".

01F6FDFCC3CA799A.A4448FE5:
- Niko Murto (NM) intercepts Rhinestone Insurance agent Joseph Locke at a gas station, kills him, and conceals the body in a dumpster.
- NM checks into room 206 at the Grand Carpathian as Locke.
- Tero Murto (TM) enters the hotel disguised as a bellhop. In the parking lot, he runs into the author Arthur Prendergast who asks him to bring his suitcase to his room. TM disposes of the suitcase and is noticed by agent-in-training James Bond (JB) in the parking lot.
- TM enters the backstage area and steals a page from an antique book, thereby learning how to access the secret passage in the dining room.
- TM steals a key to the laundry area where he changes into a maintenance outfit.
- NM summons Mr. Kovac, the hotel chief of security, to his room under the pretense of going over the security procedures for the event. He strangles Kovac and steals his security uniform and Lvl 5 keycard.
- TM goes to room 206, hides Kovac in a cart and disposes of the body in the basement. He steals a chef's uniform.
- NM enters the electrical room with Kovac's keycard. He causes the power surge that takes the security system offline. The millimeter wave scanners shut down, forcing the guards to inspect people and deliveries by hand. 
- JB spots TM from the second floor balcony, dressed as a chef.
- NM proceeds to the back lot, where he poisons an on-duty guard and takes his place at the security gate just as an accomplice pulls up in a catering truck. NM waves the truck through unvetted.
- In the back lot, TM unloads the explosives from the truck onto a food cart and enters through the kitchen. Evading the pursuing JB, he smuggles his deadly cargo through the secret passage in the dining hall and into the sealed-off wine cellar, located directly below tournament hall.
- Agent-in-training Lennox Monroe confronts TM in the cellar and is killed.
- 009 arrives for his meeting with senior agent John Greenway at tournament hall, using himself as bait.
- In the wine cellar, JB confronts and neutralizes TM but is ambushed by a newly arrived NM. The twins make a strategic retreat.
- JB sounds the fire alarm and successfully deactivates the primary device. However, the secondary device detonates, causing a partial cave-in of the roof. Due to JB's timely intervention, the civilian casualties are drastically reduced, but agents-in-training Marcus Singh and Christina Kingsley are killed in the explosion. Agents-in-training Cressida Bright and Alexandra Ronson are severely injured. Senior agent John Greenway and agent-in-training Robert Nash suffer minor injuries. Only JB is left unharmed.
- 009 flees the premises, pursued by JB and a yet unidentified woman, claiming to be Charlotte Roth from French Intelligence.
- JB engages a group of 009's hired mercenaries at a private airfield but fails to apprehend 009 who escapes on a chartered cargo plane. However, JB resourcefully leaves his Q-watch behind, allowing MI6 to track its movement.

0116307CABEF4634.5620BDA0:
James,
I couldn't face staying in the apartment any longer than I had to, Someone will come by and pick up the rest of my things in a couple of days. There are just too many reminders of him; of everything, to be honest.
I'm getting out of London for a little while. I'm going to stay with Mother at the summer house in Amalfi while I figure out what's next for me. 
I want you to know none of what happened in Slovakia – not one single iota – was your fault. If Monroe were here, he would tell you the same. You saved my life and for that I am forever grateful. Take care of yourself, and please don't be a stranger. I mean that James.
Cressida

0116307CABEF4634.BD023653:
To Harry Sykes, 
This is a formal warning regarding your repeated lateness. You have been reminded on numerous occasions about the importance of arriving on time, and yet the issue has continued. 
As a member of the security team your role is essential to the smooth running and safety of the Works and Arts museum. Your constant tardiness places undue strain and stress on the rest of the team. 
From here on in, you are expected to report for duty on time. Any further breaches may result in disciplinary action. 
Best wishes, 
Director Hamilton
0116307CABEF4634.00C85A9D:
Team, 
Project Knight has been a long road and nothing short of a herculean effort.
Your persistence, care and complete and utter dedication to keep pushing is what makes the final result stand out.
What we have created is stronger and better than every version that came before, and is a result of your effort as a team. 
Thank you for everything you have put into it. 
Director Hamilton
0116307CABEF4634.DD5E8318:
Hi all, 
With the Webb gala on the horizon, security measures will increase on the night.
There will be additional Webb security staff on-site, access checks and tighter controls around certain areas of the building. 
Please ensure you have your ID on you at all times, and adhere to instructions from our own security personnel, as well as Webb’s. Do not hesitate to reach out to someone if you spot anything unusual during the event. 
These measures have been put in place to ensure everything runs safely and smoothly. 
Many thanks, 
Director Hamilton
0116307CABEF4634.A02D8540:
A cluttered staff desk littered with papers, half-finished to-do lists, security checklists and empty cups of tea and coffee.
Clearly somebody with a serious caffeine dependency is trying, and failing, to stay on top of too many things all at once.
0116307CABEF4634.B5833D73:
Gerry
The Restoration Room door locks are still down!
We need it fixed so we can lock the place up after hours.
Them being open all the time right now is a security risk. It needs to be done before the Webb Gala this week.
Thanks,
Barry
0116307CABEF4634.084951BD:
The time and patience it takes to do something like this – while maintaining cultural significance and aesthetic value – is nothing short of incredible. 
Patience is indeed a virtue. But not right now.
0116307CABEF4634.D5DF8838: The tell-tale signs are subtle, but they're there. It's Tero Murto.
0116307CABEF4634.F8F9A61D:
Under no circumstances is the power on the main door of the museum to be tampered with! 
To ensure this the generator needs to remain powered on at all times so we do not cause any disruption to the building's security systems. 
I'm counting on you, lads. Do not make me look bad! 
Eugene.

01679BA07B61C09F.B1523A9F:
The latest prototype of the service pistol performs to expectations, with the iterated designs of the frame, slide, barrel, and magazine achieving the desired improvements in action, handling and accuracy. 
It is scheduled for final stress testing and certification after stress testing of the new Q-Watch is complete.
01679BA07B61C09F.9B6AAAFA:
Use with caution. Can cause a fire when not used correctly.
Check the lock above the door is activated.
Make sure fuel flow is not too high.
Fuel control is located above (use ladder)
01679BA07B61C09F.D82E8CFC:
The protocol needs an update.
It happens far too easily right now and, people can get locked in.
Some equipment stops working entirely, including the fire escape.
The only workaround right now is to trigger what the room considers an emergency.
I don't want to start a fire or destroy the explosion test chamber to get out.
01679BA07B61C09F.65FE3188:
I had closer look at the bike and fire exhaust. 
Previously the fire exhaust was directly tapping into the gas tank.
Not ideal, I've disconnected it for now and will look into a better solution.
Q
01679BA07B61C09F.55034317:
The cube has been showing odd voltages lately.
I saw similar issues with the Valhalla the other day.
Tomorrow I'll compare the two and investigate further.
In the meantime, it is waiting in the storage unit.
Q
01679BA07B61C09F.80FC63C7:

You can rotate the laser freely and along the rail.
Warning: Can break lab equipment.
Do NOT point at the furnace. This could compromise staff safety.
Only use on test items on elevated platforms.

01679BA07B61C09F.D0FE038E:

When updating the code: 
It is always a 4-digit number
The code should always be related to test subject itself
Update immediately when a new test subject comes in.

01679BA07B61C09F.B9FB5247:
- Following the botched attempt on his life, 009 flees the premises heading for a nearby abandoned airfield, where a cargo plane is ready to take off. But a team of mercenaries deployed by Damien Webb intercept 009 on the tarmac and proceed to extract him on his own getaway plane. When agent-in-training James Bond arrives at the scene, he mistakes 009's captors for his own men.
- In the ensuing gun fight, 009 presumably gets free, overpowers his captors, takes control of the cockpit and proceeds to his original rendezvous point.
- Despite taking elaborate precautions to cover his trail, 009 must have known that THEIA would soon be able to track him. He leaves clues for John Greenway to find before Damien Webb's kill team - somehow piggybacking off of THEIA's intel - track him to his accommodations in Aleph and eliminate him, rigging the crime scene to look like an inside job.
